dependency_rule: Dependencies point inward: infrastructure → application → domain. Domain depends on nothing. COMP-4 (shell) wires all components — it is the only module that imports across component boundaries.
note: COMP-4 (shell) is the system-level shell. The three domain components (COMP-1, COMP-2, COMP-3) do not have an internal shell layer — they expose their behavior through application use cases and ports. The shell component calls those use cases.

domain.responsibility: Pure domain model for conversation lifecycle. Owns session state transitions, history records, user and school identity references, and grounded response production. Enforces all INV-CS-* and INV-WF-* invariants. No framework, no I/O.

artifacts.name: ConversationSession
artifacts.purpose: Lifecycle owner of a multi-turn conversation. Manages state transitions (created → initializing → idle ⇄ active → closed). Enforces INV-CS-1 through INV-CS-7 and turn sequencing invariants.

artifacts.name: ConversationHistory
artifacts.purpose: Persisted record of all turns for a user. Loaded at session init to restore prior context.

artifacts.name: User
artifacts.purpose: Identity reference. Pre-resolved by external auth; never authenticated here. Carries user_id and school affiliation.

artifacts.name: School
artifacts.purpose: School the user supports. Loaded from DB at session init. Anchors the fundraising context pre-seeded into DecisionContext.

artifacts.name: Intent
artifacts.purpose: Classified purpose of a user message turn. Immutable once created. Values: product_inquiry, referral_question, general_question, clarification_response, ambiguous, out_of_scope.

artifacts.name: AssistantResponse
artifacts.purpose: Grounded response returned to the caller. Immutable. Carries groundedness_score and relevance_score. Must meet score thresholds before delivery (INV-AR-1, INV-AR-5, INV-AR-6).

artifacts.name: SessionStarted
artifacts.purpose: Emitted when session transitions from initializing to idle (ready for first turn).

artifacts.name: TurnProcessed
artifacts.purpose: Emitted when session transitions from active to idle (turn completed, response returned).

artifacts.name: SessionClosed
artifacts.purpose: Emitted when session enters closed state.

artifacts.name: IConversationSessionRepository
artifacts.purpose: Defines persistence contract for ConversationSession lifecycle.

artifacts.name: IConversationHistoryRepository
artifacts.purpose: Defines read contract for loading conversation history at session init.

artifacts.name: IUserRepository
artifacts.purpose: Defines read contract for loading User identity by user_id.

artifacts.name: ISchoolRepository
artifacts.purpose: Defines read contract for loading the School associated with a user.

artifacts.name: IPurchaseHistoryRepository
artifacts.purpose: Defines read contract for loading PurchaseHistory at session init. Optional signal — skipped if empty.

application.responsibility: Orchestrates the conversation turn loop. Invokes domain transitions. Calls external ports for intent classification, response generation, and response evaluation. Coordinates with Decision Intelligence. LangGraph is the execution engine for the turn loop — nodes are thin wrappers that call ports; domain logic stays in the domain layer.

artifacts.name: StartSessionUseCase
artifacts.purpose: Initializes a ConversationSession: resolves User and School, loads ConversationHistory and PurchaseHistory, pre-seeds DecisionContext via IDecisionIntelligenceService, transitions session to idle.

artifacts.name: ProcessTurnUseCase
artifacts.purpose: Entry point for a single conversation turn. Delegates execution to TurnGraph. Returns validated AssistantResponse to caller.

artifacts.name: CloseSessionUseCase
artifacts.purpose: Transitions ConversationSession to closed state. Final persistence of session state.

artifacts.name: TurnGraph
artifacts.purpose: LangGraph graph that executes the full conversation turn pipeline. Replaces the imperative body of ProcessTurnUseCase. Nodes call ports — no domain logic inside nodes.

artifacts.name: TurnGraphState
artifacts.purpose: Typed state schema flowing through TurnGraph. Carries only turn-scoped primitives — no domain objects. Fields: user_id, session_id, message, intent, evidence_chunks, evidence_type, response_text, groundedness_score, relevance_score, clarification_needed.

artifacts.name: IIntentClassifier
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port. Contract for classifying an Intent from a user message. Implemented in infrastructure by an LLM adapter.

artifacts.name: IResponseGenerator
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port. Contract for generating a grounded AssistantResponse from RetrievedEvidence + DecisionContext snapshot. Implemented by an LLM adapter.

artifacts.name: IResponseEvaluator
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port. Contract for computing groundedness_score and relevance_score on AssistantResponse. Enforces INV-AR-1, INV-AR-5, INV-AR-6.

artifacts.name: IDecisionIntelligenceService
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port to COMP-2. Contract for processing a turn through Decision Intelligence and receiving RetrievedEvidence. Crossed at the application layer — no domain objects from COMP-2 imported into domain layer.

artifacts.name: IRAGMetricsLogger
artifacts.purpose: Outbound observability port. Contract for persisting per-turn RAG evaluation metrics (groundedness, relevance, context scores, fallback) to rag_metrics.sqlite after TurnGraph completes.

infrastructure.responsibility: Implements all outbound ports and repository interfaces. Performs all I/O: database access, LLM calls, scoring.

artifacts.name: InMemoryConversationSessionRepository
artifacts.purpose: In-memory dict store for active session state. Scoped to process lifetime.

artifacts.name: SQLiteConversationHistoryRepository
artifacts.purpose: SQLite adapter for Conversation_History table. Primary history store.

artifacts.name: InMemoryConversationHistoryRepository
artifacts.purpose: In-memory variant of ConversationHistoryRepository — dev/test only.

artifacts.name: SQLiteUserRepository
artifacts.purpose: SQLite adapter for reading User identity.

artifacts.name: SQLiteSchoolRepository
artifacts.purpose: SQLite adapter for reading School by user association.

artifacts.name: SQLitePurchaseHistoryRepository
artifacts.purpose: SQLite adapter for reading Purchase_History table. Returns empty result set gracefully if no records exist.

artifacts.name: OpenAIIntentClassifier
artifacts.purpose: LLM adapter (gpt-4o-mini) that classifies user message into Intent value. Returns one of the six Intent values.

artifacts.name: OpenAIResponseGenerator
artifacts.purpose: LLM adapter (gpt-4o) that generates AssistantResponse grounded in RetrievedEvidence and DecisionContext snapshot.

artifacts.name: OpenAIResponseEvaluator
artifacts.purpose: Scoring adapter (gpt-4o-mini) that computes groundedness_score and relevance_score. Enforces score thresholds before response is cleared for delivery.

artifacts.name: SQLiteRAGMetricsLogger
artifacts.purpose: Persists per-turn RAG evaluation metrics (groundedness, relevance, context scores, fallback) to rag_metrics.sqlite after each TurnGraph execution.

domain.responsibility: Pure domain model for preference accumulation and retrieval query construction. Owns DecisionContext lifecycle and transitions. Enforces INV-DC-*, INV-RQ-*, and monotonic signal accumulation. No framework, no I/O.

artifacts.name: DecisionContext
artifacts.purpose: Accumulates PreferenceSignals monotonically across turns. Manages state transitions (empty → partial → ready → enriched). Enforces INV-DC-1 through INV-DC-6: context never regresses, school is always present, signals never removed.

artifacts.name: RetrievalQuery
artifacts.purpose: Context-enriched query artifact built from Intent + accumulated DecisionContext. Carries source_target (product_catalog or referral_program_rules). Enforces INV-RQ-1, INV-RQ-2, INV-RQ-3: never constructed from raw message, source_target must match intent routing.

artifacts.name: PreferenceSignal
artifacts.purpose: Single user preference or constraint extracted from one turn. Immutable once created. Examples: kids=picky, budget=sensitive, preference=healthy. Accumulated monotonically into DecisionContext.

artifacts.name: RetrievedEvidence
artifacts.purpose: Content returned from a knowledge source after retrieval. Immutable. Carries context_recall_score and context_precision_score. Quality gates enforced before evidence is passed to Conversation Management.

artifacts.name: ContextUpdated
artifacts.purpose: Emitted when a new PreferenceSignal is added and DecisionContext state changes.

artifacts.name: GapDetected
artifacts.purpose: Emitted when gap evaluation finds the context insufficient for recommendation. Triggers clarification signal in Conversation Management.

artifacts.name: ContextReady
artifacts.purpose: Emitted when DecisionContext transitions to ready state for the first time.

artifacts.name: IDecisionContextRepository
artifacts.purpose: Defines persistence contract for DecisionContext per session. Scoped to session lifecycle.

application.responsibility: Orchestrates signal extraction, context state evaluation, query construction, retrieval execution, and evidence quality evaluation across a single turn. Coordinates with Knowledge Retrieval via port.

artifacts.name: ProcessTurnIntelligenceUseCase
artifacts.purpose: Entry point for COMP-2 per turn. Delegates execution to DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph. Returns RetrievedEvidence (or clarification signal) to caller (COMP-1).

artifacts.name: PreSeedContextUseCase
artifacts.purpose: Called at session init by COMP-1. Creates DecisionContext pre-seeded with school anchor and any available PurchaseHistory signals.

artifacts.name: DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph
artifacts.purpose: LangGraph subgraph that executes the full decision intelligence pipeline per turn. Replaces the imperative body of ProcessTurnIntelligenceUseCase. Nodes call ports — no domain logic inside nodes.
conditional_edges: evaluate_context_readiness → intent_sufficient_retrieval (referral_question) → construct_retrieval_query (bypass context readiness gate)
evaluate_evidence_quality → recall_below_threshold → execute_retrieval (retry with refined query)

artifacts.name: DecisionGraphState
artifacts.purpose: Typed state schema flowing through DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph. Carries only turn-scoped primitives. Fields: session_id, intent, message, signals, context_state, retrieval_query_text, source_target, evidence_chunks, recall_score, precision_score, clarification_needed.

artifacts.name: ISignalExtractor
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port. Contract for extracting PreferenceSignals from a user message turn using LLM. Implemented in infrastructure.

artifacts.name: IEvidenceEvaluator
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port. Contract for computing context_recall_score and context_precision_score on RetrievedEvidence. Enforces INV-RE-1, INV-RE-2. If recall < threshold, signals query refinement.

artifacts.name: IKnowledgeRetrievalService
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port to COMP-3. Contract for executing semantic retrieval given a RetrievalQuery. Returns RetrievedEvidence.

infrastructure.responsibility: Implements all outbound ports and repository interfaces. Performs LLM calls for signal extraction and scoring. Persists DecisionContext.

artifacts.name: InMemoryDecisionContextRepository
artifacts.purpose: In-session store for DecisionContext. Scoped to the active session. The LangGraph checkpointer (wired in shell/composition) can optionally persist full graph state — including DecisionContext snapshot — across sessions, resolving the prior cross-session continuity gap.

artifacts.name: LLMSignalExtractor
artifacts.purpose: LLM adapter that extracts PreferenceSignal values from a user message turn.

artifacts.name: LLMEvidenceEvaluator
artifacts.purpose: Scoring adapter that computes context_recall_score and context_precision_score on RetrievedEvidence before evidence is passed to response generation.

domain.responsibility: Domain model for the two knowledge sources: product catalog and referral program rules. Defines retrieval contracts. Enforces the invariant that retrieved content is never invented or rewritten — only returned as-is from the knowledge source.

artifacts.name: Product
artifacts.purpose: A purchasable catalog item. Retrieved by semantic relevance. Never invented by the LLM. Carries identity, name, category, brand, and relevant attributes.

artifacts.name: ReferralRule
artifacts.purpose: A platform-defined referral eligibility or reward rule. Immutable. Retrieved by semantic relevance. Never rewritten by the LLM.

artifacts.name: RetrievedEvidence
artifacts.purpose: The retrieval result returned to Decision Intelligence. Typed as product_evidence or referral_rule_evidence. Immutable artifact of the retrieval execution.

artifacts.name: IProductRepository
artifacts.purpose: Defines semantic retrieval contract for the product catalog. Takes a query, returns top-matching Product evidence.

artifacts.name: IReferralRuleRepository
artifacts.purpose: Defines semantic retrieval contract for referral program rules. Takes a query, returns top-matching ReferralRule evidence.

application.responsibility: Executes retrieval routing. Receives a RetrievalQuery, routes to the correct source based on source_target, and returns RetrievedEvidence.

artifacts.name: ExecuteRetrievalUseCase
artifacts.purpose: Routes RetrievalQuery to the correct repository based on source_target (product_catalog → IProductRepository; referral_program_rules → IReferralRuleRepository). Returns RetrievedEvidence to COMP-2.

infrastructure.responsibility: Implements semantic retrieval against a vector store for both knowledge sources.

artifacts.name: QdrantProductRepository
artifacts.purpose: Qdrant vector store adapter for semantic search against the product_catalog collection. Returns top-matching Product evidence.

artifacts.name: QdrantReferralRuleRepository
artifacts.purpose: Qdrant vector store adapter for semantic search against the referral_program_rules collection. Returns top-matching ReferralRule evidence.

components.name: shell
components.note: Shell is not a domain component. It does not have DDD layers. It is the system entry point and the composition root.

api.responsibility: REST API entry point. Receives inbound HTTP requests, validates input shape, calls COMP-1 use cases, and returns structured HTTP responses. Owns no domain logic.

artifacts.name: StartSessionRequest, ProcessTurnRequest, CloseSessionRequest
artifacts.purpose: Inbound Pydantic schemas. StartSessionRequest: user_id. ProcessTurnRequest: user_id, message. CloseSessionRequest: user_id.

artifacts.name: StartSessionResponse, ProcessTurnResponse, CloseSessionResponse, ErrorResponse
artifacts.purpose: Outbound Pydantic schemas. ProcessTurnResponse carries: session_id, response_text, intent, is_fallback, groundedness_score, context_precision_score, context_recall_score, relevance_score.

artifacts.name: build_router()
artifacts.purpose: Factory function that creates the FastAPI APIRouter with three endpoints: POST /sessions, POST /sessions/{session_id}/turns, DELETE /sessions/{session_id}.

artifacts.name: create_app()
artifacts.purpose: FastAPI application factory. Calls build_container(), instantiates the router, and registers it on the app. Returns a fully configured FastAPI instance.

composition.responsibility: Composition root. Wires all components: instantiates repositories, adapters, use cases, and injects dependencies. This is the only place in the system that imports from multiple components simultaneously.

artifacts.name: build_container()
artifacts.purpose: Factory function in container.py. The only place that imports from all components simultaneously. Instantiates repositories, adapters, and use cases. Binds ports to implementations. Returns a fully wired AppContainer.

layer_dependency_summary.cross_component_dependency: COMP-1 application calls COMP-2 application via IDecisionIntelligenceService port. COMP-2 application calls COMP-3 application via IKnowledgeRetrievalService port. These are application-layer port contracts — no domain object from one component is imported into another component's domain layer.

ingestion_component.name: knowledge_ingestion
ingestion_component.deployment: offline CLI — run before system startup, not part of the runtime container
ingestion_component.note: COMP-5 follows the same Clean Architecture dependency rule (infrastructure → application → domain) but is fully isolated from all runtime components. It has its own composition root and is never imported by COMP-1 through COMP-4.

domain.responsibility: Defines the data contracts for the ingestion pipeline. No business invariants — ingestion is a pure data transformation process. Owns the port interfaces that decouple the pipeline stages.

artifacts.name: RawRecord
artifacts.purpose: A raw record loaded from a knowledge source (one product row or one PDF document) before any transformation.

artifacts.name: IngestionDocument
artifacts.purpose: A semantically labeled, embedding-ready document to be written to the vector store. Carries text, metadata, and a stable ID.

artifacts.name: IngestionReport
artifacts.purpose: Summary produced at the end of each pipeline execution: collection name, documents written, and any per-record errors.

artifacts.name: IKnowledgeSource
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port. Contract for loading raw records from any knowledge source (SQLite, PDF directory, etc.).

artifacts.name: IDocumentTransformer
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port. Contract for transforming a raw record into one or more semantically labeled IngestionDocuments.

artifacts.name: IVectorStoreWriter
artifacts.purpose: Outbound port. Contract for writing a batch of IngestionDocuments to a named collection in the vector store.

application.responsibility: Orchestrates each ingestion pipeline: load → transform → write. Each use case runs exactly one pipeline end-to-end and returns an IngestionReport.

artifacts.name: IngestProductCatalogUseCase
artifacts.purpose: Reads all product rows from the SQLite source, enriches each one via the transformer, clears the product_catalog collection, and writes the enriched documents.

artifacts.name: IngestReferralRulesUseCase
artifacts.purpose: Reads all PDF documents from the referral source, splits each into self-contained semantic chunks via the transformer, clears the referral_program_rules collection, and writes the chunks.

infrastructure.responsibility: Implements all ports. Handles all I/O: SQLite queries, PDF text extraction, LLM enrichment calls, embedding generation, and ChromaDB writes.

artifacts.name: SQLiteProductSource
artifacts.purpose: Reads the products table from the SQLite database. Returns one RawRecord per product row.

artifacts.name: PDFReferralSource
artifacts.purpose: Reads all PDF files from the docs directory using pdfplumber. Returns one RawRecord per PDF with the full extracted text.

artifacts.name: ProductSemanticBuilder
artifacts.purpose: Calls an LLM to enrich each product row with inferred semantic labels (category, meal occasion, dietary profile, budget tier). One product row → one enriched IngestionDocument.

artifacts.name: ReferralSemanticBuilder
artifacts.purpose: Calls an LLM to split PDF text into self-contained semantic chunks (rules, FAQ entries, policy sections). One PDF → N IngestionDocuments. Splitting is by meaning, not by character count. Includes a paragraph-split fallback if JSON parsing fails.

artifacts.name: ChromaVectorStoreWriter
artifacts.purpose: Embeds documents using the OpenAI embeddings API (text-embedding-3-small) and writes them to a ChromaDB persistent store. Processes embeddings in safe batch sizes. Implements clear_collection for idempotent re-ingestion.

composition_root.responsibility: Wires all ports to their adapters, instantiates both use cases, and runs both pipelines sequentially. The only place in COMP-5 that knows about all infrastructure components.
